brandStory.title: 35+ Years of Twisting Tech & Tradition
brandStory.paragraph1: Back in 1990, a small shop in downtown Heilbronn started mixing two great loves: cutting-edge technology and the warm, honest hospitality of a local pretzel bakery. That shop was Pixel Pretzels – and we’ve been kneading innovation ever since.
brandStory.paragraph2: Three decades, thousands of happy customers, and one gloriously unchanged recipe: hand-pick only the best tech, serve it with genuine expert advice, and always leave you with a warm feeling. No stale products, no half-baked promises.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Twisted Good Tech Since 1990, from Heilbronn
about.storyText: In 1990, Pixel Pretzels first opened its doors in downtown Heilbronn – back then as a small specialist shop for personal computers. What started with a handful of devices and a great deal of enthusiasm grew over the years into one of the region’s most trusted technology retailers. We have been shaping the digital revolution from the very beginning: from the first 286 processors and the rise of the internet to today’s high-end notebooks and smartphones. Over the course of more than 35 years, we have advised, supported, and equipped thousands of customers with the best available technology. Our recipe for success is as simple as it is effective: we combine deep technical expertise with honest, personal advice. When you shop with us, you don’t just buy a product – you benefit from the experience of a team that lives and breathes technology.
about.valueQualityDesc: We only carry products whose quality we are personally convinced of. Every device in our range is tested and evaluated by our experts.
about.valueServiceDesc: Personal advice is not an empty promise for us. Our team is here to help you before, during, and after your purchase.
about.valueExpertiseDesc: Over 35 years of experience in the technology industry – we know the products, the manufacturers, and above all, your needs.
about.valueTrustDesc: Since 1990, customers in Heilbronn and far beyond have placed their trust in us. This trust is our most valuable asset.
